response.overview: If you need assistance with your account, ⭐1-850-600-1393 transactions, or wallet-related issues, customer support is available through official support channels. Visit the help center ️ ⭐1-850-600-1393 , start a live chat if available, or submit a support ticket with details about your issue. For faster assistance, have your account information and relevant transaction details ready. Always use the official support ⭐1-850-600-1393 website to avoid scams and protect your account security.  Standard Uphold Accounts: No. Standard accounts function like a traditional exchange and rely on passwords and 2FA. If you are locked out, you must recover your account via email verification or identity checks with Uphold Support.Uphold Vault (Self-Custody): Yes. The Vault feature uses 12-word recovery (or "seed") phrases.
